name: Fiesta Chicken
recipeIngredient: 12 oz Chicken Breast Halves; cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, combine tomato sauce, orange juice, onion, oregano, chili powder, garlic, and hot pepper sauce.
2. Bring to boiling. Reduce heat.
3. Cover and simmer for 5 minutes.
4. Stir in chicken; return to boiling.
5. Cover and simmer for 12-15 minutes more or until chicken is tender and no longer pink.
6. Meanwhile, combine cornstarch and water. Stir into skillet.
7. Cook and stir until thickened and bubbly. Cook and stir for 2 more minutes.
8. Toss parsley with rice.
9. Serve chicken mixture over rice.
